snippets.snippet: Value for money...nice view..friendly and helpful staff...

address.address1: Jalan Balek Gunung, Gampong Iboih, Suka Karya, Sabang

atfPropertyHighlights.name: Top Value
atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Guests rated this property 9.2/10 on value for money

description.short: Conveniently situated in the Sabang part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options.

details.title: Children 0-6 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

featureGroups.name: Things to do, ways to relax

features.featureName: Hot water linen and laundry washing
Physical distancing of at least 1 meter

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The hotel is clean, comfortable, and the service is good.. my suggestion is that the lights in the lower area should be a bit brighter at night.

reviewerInfo.roomTypeName: Family Room with Side Sea View

comments.originalComment: Hotel nya bersih, nyaman, pelayanan bagus..saran nya waktu malam lampu ke area bawah agak lebih terang lagi.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The place is nice, the view is beautiful.. just a little lacking in room security, because this is a family room it should be checked again for the railing, stairs, doors, and floorboards, with regular maintenance done on the facilities. Because there are several rusty iron parts and some rotting boards.

reviewerInfo.roomTypeName: Family Room with Side Sea View

comments.originalComment: Tempatnya bagus, pemandangan juga cantik..cuman minus sedikit tentang keamanan ruangan, karena ini family room sebaiknya di cek kembali pagar, tangga, pintu dan lantai papan, dilakukan perawatan berkala terhadap fasilitas. Karrna ada beberapa besi yang sudah berkarat dan papan yang sudah lapuk

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: tempatnya bagus cantik dan bersih..suasananya aman dan tenang...layanan staffnya bagus..

reviewerInfo.roomTypeName: Family Room with Side Sea View

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Value for money...nice view..friendly and helpful staff...

reviewerInfo.roomTypeName: Family Room with Side Sea View

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Lokasinya dekat bgt dengan gua sarang. Kamar dan pemandangannya bener2 real pict bagus banget. Bisa liat sunset dan sunrise di tepi laut dari kamar langsung. Peralatan mandi lengkap tersedia. Snorkelingnya lbh murah 30 rb. Setiap menginap 2 mlm dpt gratis 1 permainan outbond. Ga ada restoran tp bisa titip dibelikan, nasi ayam penyetnya recommended.

reviewerInfo.roomTypeName: Family Room with Side Sea View
